prompt: A finished tarot card illustration for Major Arcana 0, The Fool, reimagined for PhiloCoffee club. A curious young student steps from a cafe threshold into a campus garden, carrying a small notebook, a coffee dripper, and a white enamel cup instead of a bundle. A small path of coffee beans leads forward like a question. Include subtle philosophy-club motifs: open book, dialogue circle, Socratic question marks, ZJU-inspired campus greenery without official logos. Style: elegant contemporary tarot, hand-inked lines, warm coffee brown, deep ink green, paper ivory, muted rose, small antique gold details. Composition: vertical full card art with ornamental border, centered figure, symbolic foreground and background. Constraints: no watermark, no photorealism, no brand logos, no fake QR codes, no clutter, no extra text except optional clear Roman numeral 0 and title THE FOOL if rendered cleanly.

A finished tarot card illustration for Major Arcana I, The Magician, reimagined for PhiloCoffee club. Style: elegant contemporary tarot, hand-inked lines, warm coffee brown, deep ink green, paper ivory, muted rose, small antique gold details.
